reviews.comment:
Queda como de paso. Al estar a la vera de la panamericana, es muy simple desviarte para recargar combustible. Playeros muy amables.

(Translated by Google)
It's a bit of a stopover. Being right next to the Pan-American Highway, it's very easy to turn off and refuel. The beachcombers are very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12305613765678893423/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1LXBDYVhnEAE

reviews.comment:
En general la atención es muy buena. Deberían reparar los equipos para inflar neumáticos. No funcionan correctamente.

(Translated by Google)
Overall, the service is very good. They should repair the tire inflation equipment. It's not working properly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12305613765678893423/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1MktETWtnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Todo bien. No tiene muchos surtidores y es un poco caótico el ingreso y el egreso, pero sirve para cargar combustible

(Translated by Google)
Everything's fine. It doesn't have many pumps and getting in and out is a bit chaotic, but it's fine for filling up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12305613765678893423/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPdjhyWnh3RRAB

High demand for diesel 500. It's occasionally out of stock due to the price.
